items.name: AI-interview-simulator
items.description: AI Interview Simulator   Practice technical, behavioral, and system design interviews with an AI interviewer powered by Claude. Choose your role, level, and target company (Google, Meta, Stripe…), get real-time streaming responses, and receive a scored performance review with actionable feedback. Zero dependencies  just open and interview.

items.name: infomaxxing
items.description: Doomscroll your way to knowledge. An infinite-scroll feed of core engineering concepts, styled like X/Twitter.

items.name: HeartLens-AppleWatch
items.description: Apple Watch ECG AI 深度分析 | 5 类心脏异常检测 + 心电波形染色可视化 + Qwen3.5 端侧解读 | 完全离线

items.name: SquidSquad
items.description: Make your Claude instance your entire dev team.

items.name: webshell
items.description: Shared web console for Codex, Claude, and shell sessions, built with xterm.js

items.name: devops-project-capi-dash
items.description: A web-based management interface designed to simplify the lifecycle management of Kubernetes workload clusters on OpenStack infrastructure via Cluster API (CAPI).

items.name: rpi-inference
items.description: RPI (Resonant Permutation Inference) — Zero-multiply text generation. 18K tok/s. 868 KB models. Standalone or as speculative draft engine for LLMs. Runs on N64, POWER8, x86, ARM.

items.name: Thesis-Pipeline
items.description: Stage-gated workflow for PhD proposals and thesis drafting.

items.name: veritas
items.description: Multi-agent verification for AI outputs: claim verification, RAG diagnostics, pre-action verification for agentic AI.    Includes ablation studies proving multi-agent vs single-prompt tradeoffs, FaithBench benchmarks, and bias-triggering evaluation methodology

items.name: claude-alert
items.description: A simple, customizable sound for when Claude Code finishes a task or asks you a question.

items.name: used-car-price-modeling-regularization
items.description: Used-car price prediction with high-dimensional features using OLS, Ridge, and LASSO regression pipelines in Python

items.name: caddy-sakuracloud
items.description: Caddy DNS module for Sakura Cloud DNS (ACME DNS-01 challenges)

items.name: The-Career-Spark
items.description: Find the spark already in your career. AI-assisted resume creation through honest extraction, not polished guesswork.
